title: Marketplace Manager - EaseMyTrip - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - EaseMyTrip - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip family as a Marketplace Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
